current.summary: Completed full telemetry implementation (Tasks 4-11), added Enrich() to all commands, ran /develop brainstorm+plan+validate+beads for _gentelemetry command. Ready to execute 7 beads.

activeWork.description: _gentelemetry hidden command — generates telemetry.json machine-readable event catalog for docs site
activeWork.progress: Brainstorm, plan, quality review, validation, and bead creation all complete. 7 beads ready. Task 1 (catalog.go) and Task 7 (rule file) are unblocked and ready to start.

recentDecisions: Event catalog as Go structs in telemetry package (single source of truth, not AST-derived)
Event-centric JSON format (events array with properties listing which commands use them)
Privacy guarantees as structured data in JSON (neverCollected array)
Strict drift detection test — CI fails if Enrich() key not in catalog
Pre-push hook checks telemetry.json freshness (same as commands.json)
Rule file scoped to CLI command files reminds devs to add telemetry
PersistentPostRun auto-tracks all commands via TrackCommand() — Enrich() adds properties
First-run notice reworded with clear 'To opt out' lead-in
Removed vapor error_occurred event (was in docs but never implemented)
Added Enrich() calls to 12 command files (install, add, convert, uninstall, remove, list, create, share, loadout_apply, sync-and-export, sandbox_run, registry_sync/items)
nextSteps: FIRST: Create a worktree and feature branch (e.g. feat/gentelemetry) — do NOT work on main, it's in use by another session
Dispatch bead execution to Sonnet subagents (Agent tool with model: sonnet) — the main Opus agent orchestrates but does NOT implement directly. Each task's complete code is in the plan.
Execute Task 1 (syllago-1gje9): Create cli/internal/telemetry/catalog.go with EventCatalog(), StandardProperties(), NeverCollected()
Execute Task 7 (syllago-d5fx7): Create .claude/rules/telemetry-enrichment.md (can run in parallel with Task 1)
Execute Tasks 2-6 sequentially: gentelemetry.go → tests → Makefile → release.yml → pre-push hook
After all tasks: make gendocs, verify telemetry.json output, commit and push

context.notes:
CRITICAL: This work MUST be done in a git worktree on a feature branch (e.g. feat/gentelemetry), NOT on main. Holden is doing other work on main in a different session. Use `git worktree add` or the EnterWorktree tool to create an isolated workspace, create a feature branch, do all work there, then PR back to main when complete.

This session completed a massive amount of telemetry work: Tasks 4-11 from the original telemetry plan (Init/Track/Shutdown, subcommand, call sites, TUI toast, Makefile ldflags, docs page), then fixed the first-run notice, added e2e test, filled data gaps across all commands, and added Enrich() to 12 command files. The _gentelemetry feature was then designed through /develop brainstorm+plan+validate+beads. The implementation plan at docs/plans/2026-04-03-gentelemetry-implementation.md has COMPLETE code for all 7 tasks — the next session just needs to create the files and verify. The .develop/gentelemetry.json state file tracks the workflow. Pre-existing test failures in tui_v1 (TestItemsHooksMatrix) and genproviders (hook event categories) are unrelated to telemetry work.

previousSessions.summary: Designed and began implementing PostHog telemetry for syllago — brainstorm, panel review, plan, validation, bead creation, and Tasks 1-3 executed.
